channel.title: Comments for page "Two Lost Souls"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Two Lost Souls"

item.title: Spanish Translation
item.content:encoded: This tale has now been translated into Spanish, which you can find here. Thanks to Riyer A, who did the translation.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
THE MOON CHAMPION FIGHT THE DANGEROUS MONSTER OF MOON.

I very like this tale, you got my 1+. Good history.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I see you are blind in the ears

MORE MOON CHAMPION PLEASE :D

This was inspired.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Poor 1959. First he has to deal with a pair of Eldritch Clowns and their demon doll, and now this Lunatic? Can't a Cosmonaut just stand as the last line of defence between the Earth and a Cosmic Horror in Peace? +1.

item.title: Thankings and Goodness
item.content:encoded:
Great creator of Moon Champion, God of the defender of the cosmos, giver of many tools, I thank you, my good sir, and will always seek to vanquish all those who spit, spite, and mashed potatoes at all that is good.

In all seriousness, though, 1233 is one of my favorite articles, thank you.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
as Moon Champion's creator, i deem this story most worthy, and i hereby dub thee an honorary Moon Warrior in acknowledgement of this monumental achievement, noble author. here is your Moon Cloak, which shall grant thee invisibility from the oculoids of your enemies, and here is your Moon Blade, which shall deftly unzip the squishy, blood-filled flesh of all who stand in the way of truth, cabbage, and righeousness.

hunt well, brave Warrior, and may the silvery light of Justice shine upon you always.

♥
